description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2 and EDM_IMAGE to ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/edm:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}. Add a single build stage containing a build job that runs a before_script of docker info, then executes docker build -t ${EDM_IMAGE} ., docker login -u ${CI_REGISTRY_USER} -p ${CI_BUILD_TOKEN} ${CI_REGISTRY}, and docker push ${EDM_IMAGE}. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
